perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a blue flat cap, glasses, and a white t-shirt with a gold maple leaf logo sits at a wooden table, holding up an iPhone box. (2) He rotates the box to the camera, pointing at the paper seals on the back and then at the barcode. (3) He puts the box down and picks up a dark blue/purple iPhone, using his finger to point closely at each of the three camera lenses. (4) He holds the phone horizontally and vertically to inspect the edges and the USB-C port at the bottom. (5) He holds the phone up showing the screen running a testing app with black and white circular patterns. (6) He demonstrates pressing the side volume buttons and the new tactile button on the side of the frame.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music starts. A man's voice begins speaking in Mandarin Chinese with a friendly and informative tone. (2) The vocal continues at a steady pace, explaining technical details as the music maintains a consistent tempo. (3) The soundscape remains clean with high-quality vocal clarity and no discernible background noise. (4) The music and speech conclude simultaneously.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "買到新iPhone" (Bought a new iPhone) - Hook. (2) "你一定要做這些檢查" (You must do these checks) - Instructional hook. (3) "檢查背後" (Check the back) - Functional. (4) "這個叫沒有撕開" (This is called not torn open) - Functional. (5) "檢查鏡頭" (Check the lens) - Functional. (6) "檢查你的外觀呢" (Check the exterior) - Functional. (7) "教你檢查螢幕" (Teach you to check the screen) - Functional. (8) "相機控制按鈕" (Camera control button) - Functional. (9) Social media icons for Facebook and Instagram with "3c有意思tim哥" and "3ctim" are displayed in the upper right corner throughout.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Box Seal Inspection -> Lens Inspection -> Body Inspection -> Screen Test -> Button Test

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the device
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a blue flat cap, glasses, white Roots t-shirt, and an Apple Watch with a yellow band.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, white studio wall with a brown wooden desk in the foreground.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence Checklist -> Practical Demo
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a consumer-focused tutorial designed to educate new iPhone owners on how to perform a comprehensive quality control check. It guides the viewer through inspecting packaging seals, camera lens dust, physical scratches, and screen defects to ensure they received a flawless unit.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on the inspection and use of a specific brand's new product release.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature flat cap and white branded t-shirt; characteristic high-contrast Chinese subtitle overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is highly optimized for social media engagement with clear, large text hooks at the beginning and consistent branding.
